words.def: water falling in drops from vapor condensed in the atmosphere
words.zh: n. 雨, 下雨, 雨天

words.def: a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of
words.zh: n. 空氣, 旋律, 態度

words.def: move fast by using one's feet, with one foot off the ground at any given time
